name: Revolut Business API
what_it_does: Neobank business API for managing multi-currency accounts, making payments, exchanging currencies, issuing virtual/physical cards, and accessing transaction data — enabling businesses to automate financial operations programmatically with FX at interbank rates.
use_cases: Automating international payments in 35+ currencies at interbank FX rates
Managing multi-currency business accounts and monitoring balances via API
Issuing virtual cards for team expenses and controlling spend limits programmatically
Automating payroll payments to global contractors via batch payment API
Building FX conversion workflows for treasury management at interbank rates
not_for: Consumer payments at retail point-of-sale (use Revolut Pay or Stripe)
Complex enterprise treasury management with multiple counterparties (use banking infrastructure)
Teams in countries where Revolut Business is not licensed
best_when: A startup or SMB needs to automate international payments, multi-currency accounts, and FX operations with better rates than traditional banks via clean API.
avoid_when: You need complex banking relationships, credit lines, or are in a jurisdiction where Revolut Business is restricted.

auth.notes: OAuth2 with JWT client assertion. Sandbox environment for testing. Certificate-based client authentication for security. Scoped access (read transactions, make payments, manage cards). Access tokens expire — refresh token required. Revolut for Business account required.

pricing.free_tier_limits: API access included with all Revolut Business plans; sandbox free
pricing.paid_tiers: Business plans from £19/month; API access included in all plans
pricing.notes: API access included with Business subscription — no separate API pricing. Sandbox free for development. UK-based fintech (EMI license). £55B+ valuation. Available in 30+ countries. Strong developer experience. Webhook-first event model.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per endpoint; documented in API reference

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Well-documented REST API covering accounts, transactions, payments, FX, and cards. OAuth2 with JWT client assertion. Webhook support for transaction events. Sandbox with pre-seeded test data. Good developer portal with interactive docs.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Payments support idempotency via request_id field — prevents duplicate payments. Transaction reads idempotent. Account reads idempotent. Card operations idempotent by reference.
known_agent_gotchas: OAuth2 with JWT client assertion is more complex than simple API key — requires certificate management
Business account verification (KYB) required before API production access
Payment limits apply per transaction and daily — check account limits before bulk payments
FX rates are spot — not guaranteed; lock rates explicitly for large conversions

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. JWT client assertion for strong auth. OAuth2 scopes limit access. PSD2 and EMD2 regulated — FCA authorized in UK, banking license in Lithuania (EU). GDPR compliant. Certificate-based client auth prevents token theft. Strong regulatory security posture.
